'''Meeks''' were a primitive [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], with three [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. A village of Meeks was afraid that a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] would eat them.

{{Species-stub}}
